title: OverHub
description: HubCore all-in-one, lightweight, optimized and modern
body:
![OverHub](https://i.imgur.com/eNXSx37.jpeg)
SUPPORT [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/jreCQVxsfr) SERVER

**OverHub** is an all-in-one, lightweight, optimized and modern HubCore plugin designed for Minecraft versions **1.8.x to 1.21.x**

✨ Features
- Parkour System
- Chat System
- BossBar System
- Hotbar System
- HubSword System
- Scoreboard System
- Double Jump System
- Server Selector System
- Lobby Server System
- Profile System
- All messages configurable
 
🤖 Commands
- /overhub -See the hubcore commands
- /parkour - See the parkour commands
- /setspawn - Set the spawn location
- /spawn - Teleport to spawn location

📃 Permissions
- overhub.chat.color - Write in colors
- overhub.donator - Permission for them to see you when you have rank
- overhub.staff - Permission for them to see you when you staff rank
